project_type: Angular 21 SPA in Nx monorepo (standalone components, OnPush change detection)
test_framework: No test framework configured (no spec files, unit test runner set to 'none')
test_command: No unit test command available. Verification is via build + verify:web script.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'pnpm nx build web' to confirm Angular build succeeds. 2. Run 'node scripts/verify-web-build.js' to confirm index.html is produced and config.json is excluded.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22 available. Project conventions require Node >= 24 but build works on 22.
contribution_requirements: Standalone components only (no NgModules). ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush required. Selector prefix: rm-. SCSS co-located with components. providedIn: 'root' for services. Strict TypeScript with noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature.
key_patterns: Standalone components with direct imports array. Services use @Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' }). App uses APP_INITIALIZER for config loading. Components use inline templates (except app.component which uses templateUrl). ReactiveFormsModule used in form components. AuthService/RecipeService pattern. Routes in app.routes.ts with authGuard.
directory_structure: Nx monorepo: apps/web (Angular frontend), apps/api (Lambda), apps/infra (CDK), libs/shared (shared types). Web app: src/app/auth/ (login, register, confirm components + auth.service), src/app/recipes/ (list, detail, form components + recipe.service), src/app/config/ (config.service). Assets in src/assets/.
